_README.about: Per-hull geometry for the tactical battle. All coordinates are fractions of the ship sprite quad, measured from the HULL CENTER, as [forward, lateral].
_README.forward: along the ship's facing axis. forward > 0 = toward the NOSE, forward < 0 = toward the STERN.
_README.lateral: across the hull. lateral < 0 = one side, lateral > 0 = the other (port/starboard).
_README.scale: 1.0 = half the sprite width (forward) / half the sprite height (lateral). e.g. forward 0.45 = nose tip, lateral 0.31 = hull edge.

fields.aspect: texture height / width (locks sprite proportions; keep matched to the PNG)
fields.engines: list of exhaust-nozzle anchors (engine flames spawn here). Usually forward < 0 (stern).
fields.turrets: list of weapon-mount anchors (projectiles/beams originate here). Usually forward > 0 (toward the nose).
fields.shieldArc: half-width of the deployed shield arc as a fraction of PI. 0.66 = ~119 deg each way (~238 deg total). 0.5 = 90 deg half (180 total). 1.0 = full bubble.
